exhibits.name: Area Development Agreement
exhibits.notes: ADA with summary page, sections 1–23, and exhibits (Guaranty, Confidentiality, EFT Authorization, Compliance Certificate). Minimum 3 restaurants. Development Termination Fee of $270K per undeveloped unit.

exhibits.name: Franchise Agreement
exhibits.notes: FA with summary page, TOC, sections 1–31, and exhibits (Guaranty and Assumption of Obligations, Confidentiality Agreement, EFT Authorization). 10-year initial term, four 5-year renewals. Royalty 5% (up to 8%). $50,000 initial franchise fee.

exhibits.name: Lists of Current and Former Franchisees
exhibits.notes: 2 current licensees (Flamingo Las Vegas Operating Company LLC and Circus and Eldorado Joint Venture LLC, both in Nevada under IPH2 license agreements). No actual franchisees. No former franchisees. No transfers. No FA signed but not opened.

exhibits.name: Financial Statements
exhibits.notes: Audited balance sheet only as of January 31, 2025. Auditor: Grassi & Co., CPAs (Melville, NY). Clean opinion. Assets = $100,000 cash = Members' equity. No income statement or cash flow statement (company not yet operational).

exhibits.name: List of State Agencies / Agents for Service of Process
exhibits.notes: State administrators and agents for CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MI, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI.

exhibits.name: Manual Table of Contents
exhibits.notes: Table of contents for the Operations Manuals. Manuals total 626 pages. Single-page exhibit.

exhibits.name: State Specific Addenda
exhibits.notes: State-specific modifications for CA, HI, IL, IN, MD, MN, NY, ND, RI, SD, VA, WA, WI. Key overrides include: California (venue/arbitration/choice of law/noncompete may be unenforceable; liquidated damages unenforceable per Civil Code 1671; 10% max interest); Hawaii (franchise investment law filing notice); Illinois (IL Franchise Disclosure Act protections); Indiana (no unilateral termination without good cause); Maryland (FA and ADA provisions superseded by MD Franchise Registration and Disclosure Law); Minnesota (MN franchise laws supersede; no general release; noncompete restrictions); New York (NY GBL Article 33 protections); Washington (venue must be in WA or mutually agreed; initial fees deferred until training complete and open; noncompete salary thresholds per RCW 49.62). All states show 'Pending' registration.

back_matter.name: State Effective Dates
back_matter.notes: 14 registration states listed. All showing 'Pending' status.

back_matter.name: Receipts
back_matter.notes: Third to last page plus duplicate receipts. Franchise sellers: Stephen Evans (London), Mathew Horvath (Irving TX), James Rogers (London).
